nasb.text: But the olive tree said to them, ‘Shall I leave my fatness with which God and men are honored, and go to wave over the trees?’

esv.text: But the olive tree said to them, ‘Shall I leave my abundance, by which gods and men are honored, and go hold sway over the trees?’

cnv.text: 橄欖樹對它們說：‘我怎可以放棄生產人用來榮耀　神和尊崇人的油，飄搖在眾樹之上呢？’

ccb.text: 橄榄树说，‘我怎能因为贪图凌驾于众树之上而停止出产用来尊崇神与人的橄榄油呢？’
